name: Syrup
servings: prep. time 1-2 hours | cooking time 10-15 minutes | serves 8-10
method: Combine all the sauce ingredients in a medium saucepan and place it over medium-high heat. Bring it to a boil, and cook until the sugar has completely dissolved, and the mixture thickens. Remove the clove.
In a separate pot, heat the oils and then add both the semolina flours. Cook and stir over low heat until golden brown.
Mix in the syrup and cook until the mixture thickens.
Take it off the heat and mix in the raisins.
Place in a mold and let cool down in the refrigerator for at least 1–2 hours before serving.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and garnish with walnuts and raisins.
